drafted_proposal.rationale: Ingestion is broadly solid (coverage across 14 files, word count above floor) and Irene’s LO set is mostly adequate, but three LOs are flagged thin/gap (mission phrasing, innovation mindset definition, and explicit course list). Several narration components remain ungrounded and multiple citations lack resolvable DOIs. Recommend minor edits to attach explicit source text and/or citations and clear ungrounded flags before proceeding.
